positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial macro-print featuring interwoven bioluminescent jungle flora and stylized crescent moons. The design should utilize a deep indigo and teal color palette, accented by electric coral and gold luminescence. Focus on intricate, geometric leaf vein patterns and smooth, flowing magical energy lines connecting the elements. The composition must be central and contained, suitable for a textile repeat pattern. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets cosmic fantasy, rendered with thick, clean outlines and high contrast glow. Minimal shading, maximum silhouette clarity.
